series_metadata.series_description: File contains yearly operational reports of cities countries, and townships.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain master microfilm in off site storage for 10 years, then transfer to State Archives. Retain diazo copy in operating area for 10 years, then destroy ; Paper: Retain for 1 year in the operating area, then microfilm. After microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness, then destroy hard copy records, Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred
